ch: 我們家在日月村伊達邵。

ab: iamin tata wa taun larima wa thau.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: itia iamin tata wa taun laturu a minlhafut.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: miasuun iaku naak a ama, ina, tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut numa tantuqash binanau’az a minlhafut.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: mathuaw marutaw naak a ama, numa maranash naak a ama.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mathuaw mashiqarman naak a ina, numa riqariqaz shiz a shinshii naak a ina.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: naak a ama itaun mashthauthau mat itan ya malhinuna.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ethnic language with us at home.

ab: iamin amakunakataunan ya pinangqaiza mahnariza wa qali.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: amusuun iamin smapuk sa bakbaki iaku numa naak a tantuqash a minlhafut.
ch: 我和我的兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: mathuaw iaku mushnaw tata taun a thau.
en: I like our family very much.
